---
pagetitle: "Above .500 | Sports forecasts & models"
---

```{=html}
<span class="kicker">Latest forecasts</span>
<h1 class="headline">Our sports models, updated daily</h1>
<p class="dek">Win probabilities, power ratings and playoff odds — generated by
original statistical models, re-run on every build, rendered here.</p>
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
from above500 import MODELS, nba_elo, render

updated = {"nba-elo": nba_elo.forecast()["updated"]}
seasons = {"nba-elo": nba_elo.forecast()["season"]}

cards = "".join(
    render.model_card({**m, "season": seasons.get(m["slug"], "")},
                      updated=updated.get(m["slug"]))
    for m in MODELS
)
print(f'<div class="card-grid">{cards}</div>')
```
